name: Mewtwo
description: A Pokémon created by recombining Mew's genes. It's said to have the most savage heart among all Pokémon, built entirely for spatial domination.
originLore: Forged from Mew's genome in a clandestine lab, Mewtwo was built for spatial domination. Its heart carries the heaviest psychic pressure recorded in the Aetherium registry.

lore.celestialConcordance: Mewtwo rejects creators and cages alike — its will alone writes the next coordinate of power.

quantumResonators.name: Psystrike
quantumResonators.description: Converts pure will into a physical impact vector.

quantumResonators.name: Barrier Lattice
quantumResonators.description: Erects multi-layer psychic shields around the host frame.
